mapper.select: SELECT a.*, t.type_name, u.admin_name FROM ACTIVITY a LEFT JOIN ACTIVITYTYPE t ON a.act_type_id = t.type_id LEFT JOIN AUSER u ON a.admin_id = u.admin_id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, t.type_name FROM ACTIVITY a LEFT JOIN ACTIVITYTYPE t ON a.act_type_id = t.type_id WHERE a.act_status = #{actStatus} ORDER BY a.act_start_time DESC

SELECT a.*, t.type_name FROM ACTIVITY a LEFT JOIN ACTIVITYTYPE t ON a.act_type_id = t.type_id
AND a.act_type_id = #{typeId} AND a.act_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND a.act_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
ORDER BY a.act_start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ACTIVITY act_title=#{actTitle}, act_desc=#{actDesc}, act_type_id=#{actTypeId}, act_location=#{actLocation}, act_start_time=#{actStartTime}, act_end_time=#{actEndTime}, act_max_people=#{actMaxPeople}, act_hours=#{actHours}, act_points=#{actPoints}, act_status=#{actStatus}, WHERE act_id = #{actId}
UPDATE ACTIVITY SET act_status=#{actStatus} WHERE act_id=#{actId}
UPDATE ACTIVITY SET act_current_people=#{actCurrentPeople} WHERE act_id=#{actId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACTIVITY WHERE act_status=#{actStatus}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sr.service_hours),0) FROM SERVICERECORD sr WHERE sr.service_status=1
